report.summary: Community growth cycle v16 (Mar 16): Bitcoin Treasury Companies guide + Crypto Debit Cards guide launch as new narrative angles; 6-post BTC treasury thread drafted; FOMC-week (T-2) DCA + debit card posts added; newsletter updated with both new guides (subject lines G/H/I); 1 new SVG social card created (social-bitcoin-treasury-companies-2026.svg); full posting schedule extended through Wed Mar 18.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Twitter thread (Mon Mar 16, 6 posts): Bitcoin Treasury Companies — '172 companies, $100B+, Strategy 687K BTC' narrative; DAT framework explained; counterarguments included; CTA to /learn/bitcoin-treasury-companies-guide
Tweet (Mon Mar 16): Bitcoin treasury single punchy post — 'Strategy bought when it was a reckless bet. 687K BTC later, 172 companies copied the playbook'; CTA to guide
Discord/Telegram (Mon Mar 16): Bitcoin treasury guide drop — full company count, DAT framework, Trump SBR political angle, direct URL
Tweet (Tue Mar 17): Crypto debit cards launch — Coinbase 4% back, Crypto.com 8% Obsidian, Bybit direct spend, Nexo earn-while-spend; CTA to /learn/crypto-debit-cards-guide-2026
Tweet (Tue Mar 17, pre-scheduled Wed): Crypto debit cards FOMC angle — 'Fed holds or cuts, your crypto earns cashback either way'; CTA to debit cards guide
Discord/Telegram (Tue Mar 17): Crypto debit cards drop — full comparison framing, Visa/Mastercard spend angle
Tweet (Wed Mar 18 — FOMC Day): DCA calculator tie-in — 'Three scenarios: Fed holds/cuts/surprises. One strategy that works regardless: DCA'; CTA to /tools/dca-calculator
Newsletter (Thu Mar 19): v16 additions — Bitcoin Treasury + Debit Cards sections added after exchange reviews; 3 new subject line variants (G/H/I)

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: social-bitcoin-treasury-companies-2026.svg — 1200×630 social card: left-side hero with BTC ₿ icon, title 'Bitcoin Treasury Companies 2026', subtitle '172+ companies $100B+ in corporate BTC', 3 stat pills (172+ public companies / 687K BTC Strategy / $100B+ total), NEW badge; right-side glass leaderboard panel showing top 5 holders (Strategy 687K, MARA 44K, Metaplanet 35K, Coinbase 9.4K, Tesla 10K) with proportional gradient bars, DAT framework callout box, Trump SBR note. Saved to /public/social-bitcoin-treasury-companies-2026.svg

sections.title: Analytics Context
items: Site is Day 33 — GSC organic signals accumulating past the day 14–21 window; both new guides indexed same day as publish

Bitcoin treasury companies is a high-intent keyword cluster with mostly news coverage (not evergreen guides) — strong SEO opportunity; Trump SBR narrative gives political macro angle that differentiates from financial media coverage
Crypto debit cards is a purely evergreen, high-volume search term ('best crypto debit card 2026') targeting non-DeFi-native users — widens addressable audience beyond on-chain power users
FOMC meeting Wed Mar 18 (T-2 days) creates urgency window for DCA calculator + 'macro-agnostic spending' debit card angle
April 15 US tax deadline: 30 days — tax guide in every newsletter and post footer
Pectra upgrade: 22 days to April 10 mainnet — EIP-7702 smart accounts angle; BTCFi thread queued for Sat Mar 21
